benefits.description: Excellent tan with no burning from fast-shipped product; hair darkening noted with stronger MT2; infallible tan after only two or three UV exposures with potent product

side_effects.description: Getting red/burning before tanning with slower-shipped or weaker product; requires much higher dose for the same result

protocol_notes: OP reports significant potency differences between suppliers and shipping times. Fast DHL shipping (2 days) from Chinese supplier yielded better results. Recently ordered from Harbin Jixianglong Biotech Co., Ltd and confirmed solid/quality product with great tan results, though not currently using as it is winter.
